project_type: Python AWS CDK project - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: pip for Python packages, npx/npm for CDK CLI. NODE_OPTIONS='' required before all Node/CDK commands due to proxy-bootstrap.js injection.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions and unittest.mock. Fixtures in tests/conftest.py. 298 tests.
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install boto3 botocore. 2. NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -q. 3. NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install boto3 botocore
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - allowlisted package registries available. NODE_OPTIONS='' must prefix all CDK/Node commands. Python 3.11 required.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, refactor:). TDD-first. ARCHITECTURE.md is source of truth. Do not break existing tests. Feature branches for PRs.
key_patterns: CDK stack in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py, Lambda in lambda/sleep_audio_processor/handler.py, tests in tests/unit/. Multi-env via CDK context. Issue-driven development. Agent guidelines documented.
directory_structure: Root: app.py (CDK entry), cdk.json (config), requirements*.txt. cdk_base/: stack definitions. lambda/: Lambda handler code. tests/unit/: all test files. .github/workflows/: CI. Docs: README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md, SUMMARY.md.
